headline: One Thing I'm Watching: The Market's Bad Breadth
summary: Indicators of market breadth show that this month’s rebound remains somewhat narrow—which, typically, isn’t a great sign for the sustainability of a stock rally.  This month’s rally has been primarily driven by tech shares, with stocks including Intel, Sandisk and Advanced Micro Devices surging more than 30% this month through Friday.
